what_they_are: Runs ~1.5M sq ft of dedicated US/NA return centers for major retailers; grades returns before public auction
facility_or_scale: 6 US reverse centers + network; 45M+ units/year processed
phone_or_email: Contact via Talk to an expert on site
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Call ReturnPro enterprise sales; ask to buy graded A/B home goods truckloads from their warehouses—NOT via Direct Liquidation or goWholesale sites
why_not_bstock_or_liquidation_com: Inventory often routed to owned channels last; enterprise relationship = earlier tier than B-Stock
caveats: They also own Direct Liquidation (exclude that path); need volume and approval

organization_name: DHL Supply Chain (Inmar reverse logistics legacy)
what_they_are: DHL acquired Inmar Supply Chain Solutions (2025); operates retailer return processing and disposition infrastructure
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Contact DHL Supply Chain about buying graded returns truckloads from US processing facilities—not inmarliquidates.com consumer storefront
why_not_bstock_or_liquidation_com: Physical processing arm of what was Inmar; private B2B vs SmartLots shop
caveats: Post-acquisition contacts may be in flux; ask specifically for reverse logistics buyer program

what_they_are: Privately buys truckloads from retailers/manufacturers; holds in own warehouse; resells B2B—not a branded auction portal
facility_or_scale: 150000+ sq ft warehouse; own truck fleet
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Email sales; ask for furniture/home GM return truckloads; they prepay and pick up from DCs
why_not_bstock_or_liquidation_com: Own warehouse in Perth Amboy NJ—inventory aggregated privately before resale
caveats: They are a buyer/reseller—you purchase from their warehouse stock not from Target directly

what_they_are: Operates own warehouses (TX FL NY NC etc.); buys bulk from retailers/e-commerce; sells TL/pallets direct + separate Quickbidz app
facility_or_scale: Warehouses: Fort Worth TX; Miami; New York; Charlotte; Grand Prairie TX
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Request furniture truckload quote; visit warehouse; buy direct inventory—not retailer auction portal
why_not_bstock_or_liquidation_com: Claims direct purchase from major retailers into their warehouses; not Wayfair.com/B-Stock
caveats: Also runs Quickbidz auctions—use fixed-price / sales call path; verify manifest

what_they_are: 3PL with 35+ warehouses; reverse logistics for furniture appliances bulky goods
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Contact for reverse logistics partnership or buying held inventory from retailer programs they manage
caveats: May service brands on contract; buying excess may require being their approved outlet partner

what_they_are: Helps retailers liquidate returns/overstock; pickup + quote model—private deals not branded marketplace
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Submit inventory request form; negotiate TL of returns/overstock
why_not_bstock_or_liquidation_com: No B-Stock storefront—relationship and quote driven
caveats: Small team; deal flow via network not daily catalog

what_they_are: Product remanufacturing + returns management for manufacturers/retailers; NY based
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Pitch as buyer of remanufactured or B-grade home goods flowing through their programs

what_they_are: 3PL warehouse returns processing Stockton CA; e-commerce B2B returns
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Contact for returns processing partnership or outbound liquidation buyer list
caveats: Verify current services and buyer access

organization_name: The Recon Group (TRG) / ReturnPro supply chain
what_they_are: ReturnPro subsidiary; supply chain services to world's leading retailers for returns processing
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Same as ReturnPro enterprise—TRG handles physical supply chain behind many programs

what_they_are: Omni-channel 3PL; reverse logistics for bulky furniture décor with disposition tracking
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Request reverse logistics buyer or closeout partner status for furniture returns

what_they_are: Furniture/home goods 3PL NC; warehousing fulfillment—not primarily a liquidator but in furniture supply chain
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Ask if they broker return/closeout TL from furniture clients or can introduce retailer partners

what_they_are: 3PL with dedicated returns management teams; WMS-driven inspection refund disposition
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Partner as downstream buyer for home goods lots they cannot restock
why_not_bstock_or_liquidation_com: Processes returns inside warehouse for retailers—not public site
caveats: Works for retailers not open reseller catalog

what_they_are: CA based; multi-channel reverse logistics DTC retail B2B returns
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Contact for B2B return consolidation buyer program

what_they_are: Wholesale closeout company that PURCHASES GOOB and surplus—including furniture—from businesses
facility_or_scale: Buyer not seller of returns only—also acquires inventory
truckload_model: They buy FROM you; inverse model
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Contact to learn what they pay for; compete as buyer of same streams; network for who sells to them
caveats: Inverse row—useful to learn who feeds premium off-price chain

what_they_are: Trade group connecting reverse logistics professionals; events and member directory
truckload_model: Join RLA; attend conferences; meet warehouse operators and retailer RL managers off public marketplaces
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Discovery channel—not a seller
legitimacy_score: Best way to find private RC contacts

what_they_are: Many retailers sell graded returns FIRST to contracted off-price buyers before B-Stock/Liquidation.com
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Ask Target/Walmart/Wayfair vendor compliance for approved liquidation buyer; reference industry: Ollie's Ross-style buyers
why_not_bstock_or_liquidation_com: Inbound Logistics: large buyers get distributor deals before auction platforms
caveats: This is what friend likely already does partially

what_they_are: Partner3PL / KokoQuest lists dozens of US reverse logistics cos—filter furniture bulky
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Search by state; call 5 local reverse logistics 3PLs; ask for furniture return TL programs
caveats: Manual legwork—how private market actually works

what_they_are: Companies like Ollie's Burlington etc. have private buyer relationships—mirror not compete
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Study who supplies off-price chains; approach same 3PLs they use
why_not_bstock_or_liquidation_com: Premium stock often never hits public auction

what_they_are: Club stores run internal reclamation; public face is B-Stock—exclude B-Stock path
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Ask existing contacts if Costco reclamation sells direct to approved TL buyers off-platform

what_they_are: Return centers exist but public disposal = B-Stock/Liquidation.com; private = contracted buyers only
how_to_buy_private_inventory: Do not use bstock.com rows—pursue ReturnPro/DHL/FB Liquidation/Quicklotz relationships that hold those retailers' flow
caveats: Documents why prior spreadsheet was wrong tier
